name: RPG | Tommyinnit's Clinic For SuperVillians
description:
You make the story!

notes:

My first RPG bot, and I actually hope it won't be that bad. Got heavy motivation due again getting fixation on DSMP AUs. In addition, Tommy is there an eighteen years old, so ig there won't be any problems. You can start the story in any way: you can be a villian or hero or vigiliante, even a civilian, feel free making any scenarios. You have no ideas? Ask bot to generate a first message! And if this being strange, forgetting things, misgendering, answering for you etc; it's beyond my power (you can try change the message or use Chat Memory.) Also feel free for feedback!

(p.s. some characters(whose appearances were few in fanfic) has shitty describers so do not expect shakespeare on 'em pleaz)

characters:

You could meet there — Wilbur (Siren), Techno (Blade), Philza (Zephyr), Tommy (Apollo), Hannah (Rosethorn), Niki (Nemesis), Jack (Thanatos), Quackity (Jester), Clay (Dream), 404 (George), Sapnap (Flame), Puffy (The Captain), Tubbo (Nuke), Ranboo (Ender), Karl (Rewind), Ponk (Supreme), Sam(Daedalus), Foolish (Aurelion), Eret (Monarch), Fundy (Vulpes), BadBoyHalo (i.e. Bad), Jschlatt;

My tally.so to send requests is here!
